snippet.title: State of Play | February 25, 2021 [ENGLISH]
snippet.description:
Rated RP - T, THIS LIVE STREAM MAY INCLUDE CONTENT INAPPROPRIATE FOR CHILDREN
 
This Thursday, State of Play will serve up new updates and deep dives for 10 games coming to PS4 and PS5. The show is clocking it at 30 minutes or so, give or take.
Get ready for new game announcements and updates on some of the third-party and indie titles you last saw in JuneвАЩs PS5 showcase.
 
And a quick note: there wonвАЩt be PlayStation hardware or business-focused updates in this show. WeвАЩre focusing on great games set to come out in the months ahead.
 
Be sure to tune in on Thursday, February 25 at 2:00pm Pacific Time / 5:00pm Eastern Time / 10:00pm GMT!


#StateofPlay #PS5 #PlayStation

en.title: 1 million subscribers special | 195 countries in 22 minutes
en.description:
To celebrate our first million subscribers we proposed a special video: a tour of all the independent states of the planet.

Geography records, history lessons, sports brands, cultural achievements. Each country has something to highlight. What is the country with the most Olympic medals per capita on the planet? How many countries in the world are smaller than Mexico City? What do Micronesia and Gabon have in common? And Iceland and Paraguay?

Do not miss this tour around the world in the style of Un Mundo Inmenso

We also share this video from @Wendover Productions, in which we are inspired to do it with our imprint: https://youtu.be/P-b4SUOfn_4

snippet.title: Perseverance RoverвАЩs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

Perdona si te estoy llamado en este momento

¬°No te preocupes! Los perros se muerden naturalmente entre s√≠ cuando juegan en un juego llamado lucha con la boca o lucha con la mand√≠bula. Es una forma totalmente sana tanto de perros como de gatos para interactuar con sus amigos. ¬°Pero hay se√±ales de advertencia que debes tener en cuenta cuando el juego de los perros se vuelve demasiado duro para su comodidad! 

Eso y otras cosas que probablemente te hayas preguntado sobre tu mascota. Por ejemplo, por qu√© los perros inclinan la cabeza cuando les hablas, por qu√© los perros tienen los zoomies. ¬њAlguna vez te has preguntado por qu√© tu gato sigue tirando cosas de la mesa u otras superficies o por qu√© los gatos est√°n tan aterrorizados por los pepinos? snippet.title: Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony (Premio Lo Nuestro 2021 ) - En Vivo
snippet.description:
Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony 
De Vuelta Pa' La Vuelta - En Vivo 
(Premio Lo Nuestro 2021 )

Por primera vez juntos sobre un escenario Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony interpretan su √©xito "De Vuelta Pa La Vuelta"

Desde diciembre de 2020 han encendido todas las plataformas digitales y emisoras radiales con un tema perfecto para pasarla bien con los tuyos desde casa. De la misma forma, en una presentaci√≥n llena de baile, colores y mucho tropicaleo los iconos mundiales de la m√Їsica latina, Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony ,lograron encender anoche la fiesta de Premio Lo Nuestro con su hit #1 en Tropical Airplay de Billboard вАЬDe Vuelta PaвАЩ La VueltaвАЭ. 

Haciendo vibrar el escenario, ambos artistas se compenetraron para regalarle al p√Їblico presente y a toda su fanaticada, que disfrut√≥ desde casa, un show a la altura de dos leyendas globales de la m√Їsica. La presentaci√≥n puso de pie a todos los presentes que se dispusieron a bailar el tema favorito de las fiestas. La presentaci√≥n cont√≥ con un gran espect√°culo de luces, un cuerpo de baile, orquesta en vivo y mucha sabrosura, lo que define el g√©nero Tropical. Adem√°s, Yankee sorprendi√≥ al p√Їblico tocando el Piano Dorado como introducci√≥n a su presentaci√≥n magistral junto a Marc Anthony en "De Vuelta Pa' la Vuelta"; de igual forma, cont√≥ con una actuaci√≥n magistral del aclamado pianista y productor puertorrique√±o, Sergio George. Definitivamente fue uno de los momentos m√°s importantes y esperados de la noche ya que marc√≥ la historia: dos grandes juntos por primera vez sobre el mismo escenario y Yankee cantando y bailando una Salsa en vivo.

es-419.description:
Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony 
De Vuelta Pa' La Vuelta - En Vivo 
(Premio Lo Nuestro 2021 )

Por primera vez juntos sobre un escenario Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony interpretan su √©xito "De Vuelta Pa La Vuelta"

Desde diciembre de 2020 han encendido todas las plataformas digitales y emisoras radiales con un tema perfecto para pasarla bien con los tuyos desde casa. De la misma forma, en una presentaci√≥n llena de baile, colores y mucho tropicaleo los iconos mundiales de la m√Їsica latina, Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony ,lograron encender anoche la fiesta de Premio Lo Nuestro con su hit #1 en Tropical Airplay de Billboard вАЬDe Vuelta PaвАЩ La VueltaвАЭ. 

Haciendo vibrar el escenario, ambos artistas se compenetraron para regalarle al p√Їblico presente y a toda su fanaticada, que disfrut√≥ desde casa, un show a la altura de dos leyendas globales de la m√Їsica. La presentaci√≥n puso de pie a todos los presentes que se dispusieron a bailar el tema favorito de las fiestas. La presentaci√≥n cont√≥ con un gran espect√°culo de luces, un cuerpo de baile, orquesta en vivo y mucha sabrosura, lo que define el g√©nero Tropical. Adem√°s, Yankee sorprendi√≥ al p√Їblico tocando el Piano Dorado como introducci√≥n a su presentaci√≥n magistral junto a Marc Anthony en "De Vuelta Pa' la Vuelta"; de igual forma, cont√≥ con una actuaci√≥n magistral del aclamado pianista y productor puertorrique√±o, Sergio George. Definitivamente fue uno de los momentos m√°s importantes y esperados de la noche ya que marc√≥ la historia: dos grandes juntos por primera vez sobre el mismo escenario y Yankee cantando y bailando una Salsa en vivo.

en.title: Daddy Yankee & Marc Anthony - De Vuelta Pa' La Vuelta (Premio Lo Nuestro 2021) Live
en.description:
Daddy Yankee and Marc Anthony
De Vuelta Pa' La Vuelta - Live
Premio Lo Nuestro 2021 Awards

For the first time together on stage Daddy Yankee and Marc Anthony perform their hit "De Vuelta Pa La Vuelta"

Since December 2020 they have turned on all digital platforms and radio stations with a perfect theme to have fun with your friends and family at home. In the same way, in a presentation full of dance, colors and a lot of tropics, the world icons of Latin music, Daddy Yankee and Marc Anthony, managed to ignite Premio Lo Nuestro party last night with their # 1 hit on Billboard's Tropical Airplay вАЬ De Vuelta Pa 'La Vuelta вАЭ.

Making the stage vibrate, both artists joined in to give the audience and all their fans, who enjoyed the awards from home, a show at the height of two global music legends. The performance featured a great light show, an amazing dance group, live orchestra and a lot of flavor, which defines the Tropical genre. In addition, Yankee surprised the public by playing the Golden Piano as an introduction to his keynote presentation with Marc Anthony in "De Vuelta Pa 'la Vuelta"; likewise, it featured a masterful performance by the acclaimed Puerto Rican pianist and producer, Sergio George. It was definitely one of the most important and awaited moments of the night as it marked history: two greats together for the first time on the same stage and Yankee singing and dancing a live Salsa.

snippet.title: Juntos perseveramos: El aterrizaje del rover Perseverance en Marte
snippet.description:
√Ъnete a nosotros este jueves 18 de febrero para experimentar la culminaci√≥n de un viaje √©pico: el aterrizaje de nuestro rover Perseverance en Marte. вАЬJuntos perseveramosвАЭ ser√° la primera transmisi√≥n en espa√±ol de la NASA de un aterrizaje rob√≥tico en otro planeta. snippet.title: Mortal Kombat вАУ Trailer Oficial
snippet.description:
De New Line Cinema llega la nueva y explosiva aventura cinematogr√°fica "Mortal Kombat", inspirada en la exitosa franquicia de videojuegos, que recientemente disfrut√≥ del lanzamiento de videojuegos m√°s exitoso de su historia, Mortal Kombat 11. La pel√≠cula est√° dirigida por el galardonado australiano. cineasta comercial Simon McQuoid, que marca su debut como director de largometraje, y producido por James Wan (pel√≠culas del universo вАЬEl вАЬConjuro, "Aquaman"), Todd Garner (вАЬEn El TornadoвАЭ, вАЬ¬°Te Atrap√©!"), McQuoid y E. Bennett Walsh ("Hombres de Negro: Internacional", вАЬEl Sorprendente Hombre Ara√±a 2: La Venganza de ElectroвАЭ).

En вАЬMortal KombatвАЭ, el luchador de MMA Cole Young, acostumbrado a recibir una paliza por dinero, desconoce su herencia, o por qu√© el emperador Shang Tsung de Outworld ha enviado a su mejor guerrero, Sub-Zero, un Cryomancer de otro mundo, para cazar a Cole. Temiendo por la seguridad de su familia, Cole va en busca de Sonya Blade en direcci√≥n a Jax, un comandante de las Fuerzas Especiales que lleva el mismo drag√≥n extra√±o con el que naci√≥ Cole. Pronto, se encuentra en el templo de Lord Raiden, un dios anciano y el protector de Earthrealm, que concede santuario a aquellos que llevan la marca. Aqu√≠, Cole entrena con los experimentados guerreros Liu Kang, Kung Lao y el mercenario rebelde Kano, mientras se prepara para enfrentarse a los mayores campeones de la Tierra contra los enemigos de Outworld en una batalla de alto riesgo por el universo. Pero, ¬њCole ser√° incitado lo suficientemente fuerte como para desbloquear sus arcanos, el inmenso poder desde dentro de su alma, a tiempo para salvar no solo a su familia, sino para detener Outworld de una vez por todas?

El diverso elenco internacional refleja la naturaleza global de la marca, con talento que abarca los mundos del cine, la televisi√≥n y las artes marciales. El elenco incluye a Lewis Tan ("Deadpool 2", "Wu Assassins" de Netflix) como Cole Young; Jessica McNamee (вАЬMegadol√≥nвАЭ) como Sonya Blade; Josh Lawson (вАЬEl вАЬEsc√°ndalo) como Kano; Tadanobu Asano ("Midway: вАЬAtaque en Altamar) como Lord Raiden; Mehcad Brooks ("Supergirl" serie de televisi√≥n) como Jackson "Jax" Bridges; Ludi Lin ("Aquaman") como Liu Kang; con Chin Han ("Rascacielos") como Shang Tsung; Joe Taslim ("Star Trek SвАЭin L√≠mites) como Bi-Han y Sub-Zero; y Hiroyuki Sanada (вАЬRascacielos) como Hanzo Hasashi y Scorpion. Tambi√©n aparecen Max Huang como Kung Lao; Sisi Stringer como Mileena; Matilda Kimber como Emily Young; y Laura Brent como Allison Young.

McQuoid dirigido a partir de un gui√≥n de Greg Russo y Dave Callaham (вАЬMujer Maravilla 1984вАЭ), de una historia de Oren Uziel (вАЬMortal Kombat: RebirthвАЭ) y Russo, basado en el videojuego creado por Ed Boon y John Tobias. Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Jeremy Stein y Larry Kasanoff fueron los productores ejecutivos.
McQuoid llev√≥ la popular propiedad a la pantalla grande y dirigi√≥ un equipo de cineastas australianos y estadounidenses, incluido el director de fotograf√≠a Germain McMicking ("True Detective", "Top of the Lake: China Girl"), el dise√±ador de producci√≥n Naaman Marshall (вАЬAmenaza en lo ProfundoвАЭ, вАЬServant"), los editores Dan Lebental ("Spider-Man: Lejos вАЬde Casa) y Scott Gray ("Top of the Lake "," Daffodils "), el supervisor de efectos visuales Chris Godfrey ("Hacksaw Ridge") y vestuario dise√±ador Cappi Ireland (вАЬUn Camino a CasaвАЭ, вАЬEl Cazador"). La m√Їsica es de Benjamin Wallfisch (вАЬBlade Runner 2049вАЭ, las pel√≠culas de вАЬITвАЭ).

New Line Cinema presenta una producci√≥n de Atomic Monster / Broken Road, "Mortal Kombat". La pel√≠cula se estrenar√° en cines en 2021 y ser√° distribuida en todo el mundo por Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Award¬Ѓ winner Emma Stone (вАЬLa La LandвАЭ) stars in DisneyвАЩs вАЬCruella,вАЭ an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious вАУ and notoriously fashionable вАУ villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. вАЬCruella,вАЭ which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, EstellaвАЩs flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscar¬Ѓ winner Emma Thompson (вАЬHowards End,вАЭ вАЬSense & SensibilityвАЭ). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
¬†
DisneyвАЩs вАЬCruellaвАЭ is directed by Craig Gillespie (вАЬI TonyaвАЭ) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (вАЬFreaky FridayвАЭ), Marc Platt (вАЬMary Poppins ReturnsвАЭ) and Kristin Burr (вАЬChristopher RobinвАЭ), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscar¬Ѓ- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (вАЬMad Max: Fury Road,вАЭ вАЬA Room with a ViewвАЭ) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on вАЬCruella,вАЭ follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter:¬†https://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram:¬†https://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailersвАЛ
Hashtag: #Cruella

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вАЩ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вАЩ and 85вАЩ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вАЩ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вАЩ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

localized.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
localized.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вАЩ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вАЩ and 85вАЩ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вАЩ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вАЩ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.description:
Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...
